title: DuPont Commits to Set Science-Based Targets for GHG Emissions Reduction
text: WILMINGTON, Del. , July 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced it has committed to setting science-based targets to reduce greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions in line with the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi), a partnership between CDP, the UN Global Compact, World Resources Institute (WRI) and the World Wide Fund for Nature (WWF).

title: DuPont Schedules Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call
text: WILMINGTON, Del. , July 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont (NYSE: DD) will release its second quarter 2022 financial results at 6:00 a.m.
